pick_implementation.title: Link your SmartHQ account
pick_implementation.description: Click **Link** to open the SmartHQ login page and authorize Home Assistant.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only a single instance is allowed.

init.title: SmartHQ options
init.description: Configure display and assistant conveniences. The Telegram bridge and conversation agent are optional and only used if you enable them.

data_description.conversation_agent: Select the conversation agent that has the SmartHQ LLM API enabled. Required for the Telegram bridge.
data_description.telegram_allowed_chat_ids: Only these Telegram chat IDs may control your appliances. Leave blank to rely solely on the Telegram bot's own allow-list.
